- **來源：** Bloomberg Markets
- **時間：** Tue, 12 May 2026 22:08:25 GMT
- **摘要：** A resurgence in inflation drove stocks and bonds lower on speculation the Federal Reserve will keep interest rates higher for longer as the war in Iran boosts energy costs.

### [Oil Holds Near $108 With Mideast Impasse, World Inventories Drop](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-05-12/latest-oil-market-news-and-analysis-for-may-13)

- **來源：** Bloomberg Markets
- **時間：** Tue, 12 May 2026 22:03:44 GMT
- **摘要：** Oil largely held its 8% surge over the past three sessions, as Middle East tensions simmer and global stockpiles shrink at a record pace.

### [North Sea Oil Fetches Discount for First Time During Iran War](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-05-13/north-sea-oil-fetches-discount-for-first-time-during-iran-war)

- **來源：** Bloomberg Markets
- **時間：** Wed, 13 May 2026 12:45:28 GMT
- **摘要：** A North Sea oil grade that’s central to setting the world’s most important physical crude price traded at a discount for the first time during the Iran war, as immediate fears ease of a supply shock in Europe.

### [US 10-Year Treasury Yield Hits Highest Since July After PPI Data](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-05-13/us-10-year-treasury-yield-hits-highest-since-july-after-ppi-data)

- **來源：** Bloomberg Markets
- **時間：** Wed, 13 May 2026 12:39:56 GMT
- **摘要：** The yield on benchmark 10-year Treasuries rose to the highest since July after US wholesale inflation accelerated in April to the fastest pace since 2022.

### [Iran War Tests Turkish Central Bank’s Ambitious Inflation Target](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-05-13/iran-war-tests-turkish-central-bank-s-ambitious-inflation-target)

- **來源：** Bloomberg Markets
- **時間：** Wed, 13 May 2026 12:39:01 GMT
- **摘要：** A global energy price shock sparked by the US-Israeli war on Iran is forcing Turkey’s central bank to raise its inflation forecasts, putting further strain on the country’s efforts to slow price gains.
